name: Frost Breath
description: This bottle of frozen vapors is captured in the frozen peaks of the crown of the world. After inhaling frost breath, you gain resistance 5 to cold. You can exhale the frost breath as a single action to release a spray of frigid air in a . Each creature in the area takes |options:area-damage] damage with a save. For 10 minutes, surfaces in the area are covered in ice, becoming difficult terrain and uneven ground ().
